tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose regulation or early diabetes, despite a low fasting glucose. There is also low total cholesterol and low CO₂, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or respiratory compensation. Other parameters, including renal function and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
